creator: freebsd@nagilum.org
text:
===>>> Upgrade of qt4-linguist-4.7.4_1 to qt4-linguist-4.8.4 succeeded
  :)

Zitat von Max Brazhnikov <makc@freebsd.org>:

> On Mon, 04 Feb 2013 08:32:49 +0100, you wrote:
>> I'll try again when I have all the dependencies updated (especially
>> qt4-designer).
>>
>> Zitat von Max Brazhnikov <makc@freebsd.org>:
>>
>> > On Sun, 03 Feb 2013 21:56:44 +0100Thu, 10 Jan 2013 18:01:16 +0100,
>> > FreeBSD@nagilum.org wrote:
>> >> But I sent the attached e-mail?!
>> >
>> > Sorry, I've missed it. I have updated Qt to  4.8.4, could you  try it?
>> >
>> >> Zitat von makc@freebsd.org:
>> >>
>> >> > Synopsis: devel/qt4-linguist 4.8.2 build failure
>> >> >
>> >> > State-Changed-From-To: feedback->closed
>> >> > State-Changed-By: makc
>> >> > State-Changed-When: Sun Feb 3 17:40:18 UTC 2013
>> >> > State-Changed-Why:
>> >> > Feedback timeout
>> >> >
>> >> > http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=171671
>
> Please keep CC to bug-followup@FreeBSD.org , otherwise your reply could lost
> again.
>
> Cheers,
> Max
